privileged_info_summary: SPY is the correct ticker for the State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust. The price levels specified (Entry 450.00, Stop Loss 455.00, Target 435.00) are all realistic and have traded during the 2023-2024 period covered by the provided historical data. RiskReward is a legitimate NinjaTrader 8 built-in drawing tool used for marking entry, stop loss, and profit target levels. The workspace directory path specified matches NinjaTrader 8's default storage location for workspaces. The short trade setup is correctly configured with stop loss above entry (455 > 450) and profit target below entry (435 < 450), which is the correct direction for a short position. All real data comes from Yahoo Finance historical price data provided in the task environment.
